raw_text: blinkit is sooo good! but I would like it to add things like different types/colours of yarn, crochet hooks and original buldak sauce as a ramen lover. all other things are good. and please add those yarns because as a crocheter, I can't get out of home right after I don't have an yarn for my projects and blinkit can help me get them in 15-20 minutes maximum. it will be so helpful!

I had good respect for the TATA but this is very shameful response from this team. Handling charges not returned even when my order was cancelled by them this is repetitive and after more follow-ups I am unable to fight for some handling charges wasting my time ruining my energy for a simple handling charge ....it's better to go offline and buy stuff as cheating is not there no handling charges if you don't get anything.. simple cheating in the name of availability

Feedback regarding App Tracking and Call Issues 1. GPS Syncing: The app continues to show the partner as "far away" even after they have arrived at my location. 2. Call Filtering: Partner calls are being automatically flagged as spam, preventing immediate communication. 3. Time Efficiency: Due to these technical lags, both the partner and I lost 15 minutes of productive time. The speed of your actual delivery service remains absolutely spectacular!

I received both the water bottles and the soft drink completely warm and not chilled at all. In this 40°C weather, customers naturally expect beverages to be properly cold. The product quality and overall experience were disappointing. I hope the team reviews this issue seriously and takes appropriate action for customer satisfaction..

Dear Team, Vehicles are not reaching the Mannal location on time, and repeated follow-ups are required to get updates. Additionally, the customer care team frequently suggests cancellation instead of providing proper support or resolution. This is causing inconvenience and service delays. Kindly look into the matter and take necessary corrective action to ensure timely service and improved customer support. Regards Rajiv Mishra

Your packaging is going very much poor day by day. You delivering food items and it should be very much safe and good packaging. Paper bag is not perfect for the food products. The bag is going to get torn and the products fall down on road. Is this acceptable? please try to make sure for good packing, and good packaging is mandatory for food items. Concern this matter to your higher authorities for solutions.

This app is super helpful and incredibly fast! The items always arrive in just a few minutes, exactly as promised. The app is very easy to use, and the quality of the products is always great. It's definitely my go-to app for quick shopping!

items showing as unavailable after placing the order. No refund on handling charges when only part of the order is delivered. And order is getting delayed. wrong items being delivered and items being delivered on the last day of expiry

deliveries are faster and the delivery people too speak well mannered but at very few orders like 1/100th order is kinda damaged slightly I used to order monster energy drinks a lot a small tint maybe found (guys I'm a monster energy collector 😭😞✌🏻 that means a lot) so I wish they could see through that alone!

As I heard blinkit can deliver within 10min but there is no godown in our area and it shows select other area but mine area is on of the biggest infrastructure area (adibatla TCS) I don't whether is good thing or not but I think you should start delivering our area to
just so bad because can't just cancel the order just after 1 sec and delivers wrong items many time and once it also took the return of the product but not refunded

I feel these days blinkit is cheating....from now on for the next 2 months I will not order anything from blinkit and Instamart....coz today I ordered for 252 inr....but what I found is that I am paying 337....the moment I clicked pay now app said price changed from 307 to 337....also there is no 10 min service not even 20 min in my area earlier it used to be 8 min delivery.....all of that is not fair folks..... anyways not an issue soon enough I ll get over being ur app's daily user....

Scam - I ordered some items as I was undergone a surgery and couldn't go outside. The reorder of some items which were missed in delivery was done by blinkit side . Then a lady called and told to change location and reorder. The reorder from blinkit side got cancelled automatically. After reordered myself the delivery guy came and ask me to pay. But I told it's missing items. Again I called, same lady and she told me to pay. Delivery guy went away. Still no response or no refund.Better to switch

Been using this app for a long time, no issues with delivery. But pricing is disappointing. Ordered 3 items (Peri Peri Veg Momos, sauce, Crispello) - total ₹400. Checked same items on Zepto - total ₹320. Big price difference for the same products. Why?

Dnt use blinkit, their after sales is pathetic, i ordere few products and they sent heavy sauce bottle along with milk and other things in paper bag, it got torn Right in front of my gate , all over my foot and all over the other items, i asked delivery guy to click pictures , and then i cleaned it after taking pics but to my shock i found u can not upload images from gallery but it has to be live , so after one hour of explaining to Aman and other 2 people , no refund just sorry we cant help!
Best app , I like their services. But the only thing is that they take delivery charges for only one item. they make cheap items to expensive. If you fix this problem, I appreciate it thanks.
The delivery is excellent, though some products are unavailable; also, the delivery boy's location tracking system after placing an order is great.

Received a damaged product and had a very disappointing experience. I tried to contact support, but the support system was not working properly. There seems to be no way to get help or resolve the issue. Customers deserve better service and quality control. Please provide a replacement or refund as soon as possible
